hypothesis_en: Mr President, ladies and gentlemen, the sitting is now open. In accordance with Rule 66 of Parliament's Rules of Procedure, I must proceed to the following communication. Parliament adopted the position adopted at first reading on 22 April 2004 with a view to the adoption of the decision of the European Parliament and the Council amending Decision 2 of the Multiannual Programme in favour of enterprises and the entrepreneurial spirit, in particular for small and medium-sized enterprises. The act is therefore approved and I have proceeded, together with the President of the Council, to signing it in accordance with Article 68 of our Rules of Procedure. 2004. MEPs Mario Borghese, Enrico Speroni, Matteo Salvini and Umberto Bossi have joined the Independence and Democracy Group. I would like to ask the Commissioner whether he is aware of the fact that the Commission has not yet taken a decision on this matter, and if so, what is the Commission's position?
reference_en: good morning Honourable (1.17) Members I declare the sitting open (2.11) (1.14) in (1.01) accordance with article sixty-six of the Parliament's Rules of Procedure I have to make the following communication (1.82) in accordance with paragraph two of article two hundred and fifty-one of the EC Treaty the Council (1.36) has informed me (1.44) that it is adopting the Parliament's position approved in first reading on twenty-second of April two thousand and four with a view to the adoption of the decision of the European Parliament and of the Council (1.62) modifying decision two thousand stroke eight one nine stroke EC relating to the multi-annual programme for business and business spirit in particular for small and medium sized enterprises two thousand and one to two thousand and five two thousand and three stroke zero two nine two COD this act is thereby approved and together with the President office of the Council I have signed this legal act in accordance with article sixty-eight of the Rules of this House (2.53) I must also inform you that as of the twentieth of July two thousand and four Honourable Members Mario Borghezio Enrico Speroni Matteo Salvini and Umberto Bossi have joined the group named Independence and Democracy (1.02) (3.02) now (1.04) Honourable Members (1.12) we have to adopt the agenda for this morning there are no changes (1.37) so the order of business remains unchanged (1.56) (1.84) a point of order from Hans-Peter Martin I give him the floor
source_es: señoras y señores diputados (1.38) se abre la sesión (4.22) de conformidad con el artículo sesenta y seis del Reglamento del Parlamento (1.18) debo proceder a la siguiente comunicación de acuerdo con el apartado dos del artículo doscientos cincuenta y uno del Tratado CE (1.27) el Consejo (1.48) me ha informado (1.26) de que adoptaba la posición del Parlamento aprobada en primera lectura el veintidós de abril del dos mil cuatro (1.05) con vistas a la adopción de la decisión del Parlamento Europeo y del Consejo por la que se modifica la decisión dos mil barra ochocientos diecinueve barra CE relativa al programa plurianual en favor de la empresa y el espíritu empresarial en particular para las pequeñas y medianas empresas PIME dos mil uno dos mil cinco dos mil tres barra cero dos nueve dos COD el acto queda por tanto aprobado (1.62) y he procedido junto con el Presidente del Consejo a la firma del mismo de conformidad con el artículo sesenta y ocho de nuestro Reglamento (1.01) debo también comunicarles que con fecha veinte de julio del dos mil cuatro los señores diputados Mario Borghezio Enrico Speroni Matteo ~Salvani y Umberto Bossi han adherido al Grupo Independencia y Democracia (3.36) señoras y señores diputados debemos proceder a continuación a la aprobación del orden del día (1.06) no existe ninguna modificación de modo que el orden del día permanece inalterado (1.48) (1.2) me señalan que hay una cuestión de orden que va a plantear el señor Hans-Peter Martin que tiene la palabra para ello
